paper.title: Evidence Ledger Compressor for Long Ralph Loops

claims.text: The compressor reduces a 19,400-token loop log to a 1,180-token curated status page.
claims.rationale: The claim has overlapping evidence in the paper.

claims.text: The compressed status page preserves all 12 gold evidence anchors.
claims.rationale: The claim has overlapping evidence in the paper.

claims.text: The compressor should generalize to multi-agent loops with more than three agents.
claims.rationale: The claim is prospective, missing a direct run, or tied to an explicit limitation.

evidence.text: The token count table reports 19,400 input tokens and 1,180 output tokens for the saved loop.
The evidence-anchor audit reports 12 of 12 gold anchors preserved in the compressed status page.
No multi-agent loop with more than three agents is included in the evaluation.

limitations.text: No multi-agent loop with more than three agents is included in the evaluation.

filtered_criticisms.text: The authors should build a mobile dashboard before evaluation.

selected_next_experiment.hypothesis: A bounded experiment can resolve whether the paper's evidence supports C3: The compressor should generalize to multi-agent loops with more than three agents.
selected_next_experiment.baseline: Use the closest reported evidence sentence as the baseline before running the missing check.
selected_next_experiment.keep_condition: claim-specific pass rate passes on a held-out fixture and the evidence can be reproduced from saved artifacts.
selected_next_experiment.discard_condition: claim-specific pass rate fails on the held-out fixture or requires evidence not present in the paper artifacts.
selected_next_experiment.verify: Run the smallest saved fixture that directly targets C3 and attach the run artifact.
